# truenas_systemdataset (Data Source)

Provides the singleton system dataset configuration on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_systemdataset" "current" {}

output "system_pool" {
  value = data.truenas_systemdataset.current.pool
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `basename` (String) System dataset basename.
- `id` (String) Singleton ID (always 'systemdataset').
- `path` (String) On-disk path of the system dataset.
- `pool` (String) Pool hosting the system dataset.
- `pool_set` (Boolean) Whether the pool has been explicitly set.
- `uuid` (String) System dataset UUID.
